notes.loader_behavior: audioManifest.js specifies paths without extension (e.g. '/game/audio/music/garage_warm_oud'). AudioManager tries .ogg first, then .mp3. The .wav files are never reached by the loader.
notes.build_verification: npm run build succeeded with 0 missing-asset errors. Build completed in 11.07s.
notes.manifest_path_check: grep for '_archived' in audioManifest.js returned 0 matches. No manifest paths resolve into _archived/.

manual_review_needed.reason: 0-byte placeholder .ogg. Referenced by manifest key 'desert_discovery'. The audioManifest comment (line 358) confirms this was already known: 'desert_discovery has no real audio file on disk (only a 0-byte placeholder .ogg). Any scene that mapped to it used to go silent.' No .wav or .mp3 companion exists. Action needed: produce a real .ogg or .mp3 for this track, or remove the manifest entry if the track is unused. This is a content task, not an archival task — left untouched.

kept_files.note: All 0-byte .ogg placeholders kept — they are the loader-referenced files; removing them would prevent even silent load attempts

notes.pixel_pedal_parade_note: All 4 pixel_pedal_parade variants (base, v2, v3, v4) are explicitly declared in audioManifest.js MUSIC array with distinct keys, descriptions, moods, and scene assignments. They are NOT orphan alt-mix drafts — they are intentional distinct tracks. All kept.
notes.sfx_ambient_note: All SFX bike/ui/world and ambient directories contain only .gitkeep (no actual audio files). These are placeholder directories for future content — not archived (nothing to archive).

blockers_discovered.impact: These tracks produce silence in-game. The WAV masters for 5 of them have been archived (they were never reachable by the loader). The WAV masters should be exported to .ogg/.mp3 and placed at the same paths before the next content milestone.
blockers_discovered.action_required: Export compressed versions (.ogg or .mp3) from the archived WAV masters and place at original paths, OR restore the WAVs from _archived/ as a temporary measure. This is a content production task, not a code task.

next_agent_suggestions.description: Convert the 5 archived .wav masters to .ogg (or .mp3 fallback) and place compressed versions at the original public/game/audio/ paths. Required before those tracks are playable in-game.
